no: Haer'Dalis Romance Sarevok Romance incompatibility instructions: http://www.shsforums.net/topic/60575-compatibility-issue-haerdalis-sarevok-romance/ Last updated a decade ago. Let's install it first.
sum: Adds a full romance path for Haer'Dalis in BG2. Turns the tiefling bard's flirtation into a developed relationship with extensive dialogue.
